title: Additional feature on 'Create an item on board' that allows to add a link from which the item is created from

posts.author: ncortez (Neri)
posts.cookedHtml:
Additional feature on ‘Create an item on board’ that allows to add a link from which the item is created from.

Example:
I am collating all the requests of the staff in one board. I added this automation, but I would like to have a board link column from where the request comes from.

image1246×724 46.2 KB
